name: Red Tamales Filling (Pork or Chicken)
recipeIngredient: 1 kilogram pork (the part of your choice), cut into strips
recipeInstructions:
1. Boil the pork in water with salt and keep the broth for use when preparing the "masa" for tamales.
2. Prepare a sauce with chiles: place them in hot water for one hour or cool water overnight, wash the chiles, discard the seeds, add the chiles and ground with vinegar.
3. Mix and grind garlic cloves, cumin seed, and sweet peppers. Fry them in a small amount of vegetable oil. Add the salsa made with the chiles and vinegar, cook for 20 minutes, then add the pork meat and some broth. Cook for another 20 minutes. Let cool before using for tamales.
4. This recipe can also be prepared with chicken.
